description: Result emitted by public assignment lifecycle operations, including transition status, mutation effect, local artifacts, and recovery guidance.

artifact_refs.description: Local artifact references written or inspected during the lifecycle transition.

kind.description: Versioned result envelope discriminator for assignment lifecycle operations.

mutation_applied.description: Whether the operation applied a local lifecycle state mutation.

operation_id.description: Public operation id that produced this lifecycle result.

outcome.description: High-level result category for automation and closeout proof.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable reason for blocked, failed, or no-op outcomes when available.

recovery_command.description: Suggested command or action to recover from a blocked lifecycle transition.

run_id.description: Assignment run identifier associated with the transition.

state.description: Current local lifecycle state after applying or evaluating the transition.

status.description: Specific lifecycle status, such as handoff-prepared, awaiting-admission, admitted, integrated, or blocked.

transition.description: Lifecycle transition name executed by the operation.

title: Assignment lifecycle operation result
